name: syslog-mcp
description: Homelab syslog receiver and MCP server for searching, tailing, and correlating logs across hosts.

settings.name: Database Path
settings.description: Path to the SQLite database for syslog storage (e.g., /data/syslog.db)

settings.name: Syslog Listen Port
settings.description: UDP/TCP port for receiving syslog messages (default: 514)
